objective:
Objectif de stratégie de trading:
[Momentum] sur [0GUSDC en 1h]. Indicateurs : EMA + MACD + Vortex. Entrées : Momentum > 0.7 et Aroon Up < 30, sorties : Supertrend < 25 et Bollinger Middle Band entre 95% - 98%. Risk management : Stop Loss à 6%, Profit Target à 4%.

Contenu: Ce plan de stratégie de trading vise la reconnaissance d'une tendance forte dans le marché Bitcoin-USDC, en utilisant des indicateurs clés tels que l'EMA pour mieux visualiser les courbes de référence et le MACD pour mesurer la force du mouvement. Le Vortex ajoute une dimension supplémentaire avec un score d'appréciation plus complexe de la volatilité des paires en ligne, offrant ainsi des repères supplémentaires sur lesquels poser le capteur de mouvements. Les filtres originaux viennent renforcer cette approche avec un critère d'intensité du mouvement (Momentum) et une mesure complémentaire pour prédire l'orientation de la tend

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the Bollinger Bands and the Relative Strength Index (RSI) with the Vortex indicator allows us to identify strong trends in Bitcoin-USDC, while also considering volatility levels and price momentum. The Aroon Up indicator helps confirm the upward trend, and we use a Bollinger Middle Band as an additional filter for trending markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines multiple indicators such as Bollinger Bands, Relative Strength Index (RSI), Vortex and Aroon to identify strong trends in Bitcoin-USDC. It also considers volatility levels through a Bollinger Middle Band filter. The entry long condition is based on close prices crossing above the Bollinger Middle band, RSI values greater than 70 and Vortex readings higher than 8. Exit rules include closing prices crossing below the Bollinger Middle band or Aroon Up values falling below 15 with average true range (ATR) less than three times its entry ATR or close prices exceeding the upper Bollinger Band. The risk management includes a stop loss at 6% and a profit target at 4%.
[Backup plan] If results are poor, I would try to adjust the strategy by changing one of the indicators used such as the Vortex indicator. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), I could consider adjusting parameters like the stop loss or profit target levels.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining momentum, mean reversion and relative strength indicators to identify trending market conditions in Bitcoin USDC pair.
